failureDecomposition.currentDecisionRule: Experiment 23 can classify lane occupancy when baseState is outside_base_deployment even if independent movement region is base_*.
failureDecomposition.suspectedTechnicalCause: Base/deployment precedence relies on model-local baseState and does not honor independent region evidence.

failureDecomposition.currentDecisionRule: Balanced model permits medium lane core at separation margin >= 45.
failureDecomposition.suspectedTechnicalCause: Low separation margin creates brittle lane assignment near boundaries.

failureDecomposition.currentDecisionRule: Lane occupiable uses an expanded envelope with multiplier 1.25.
failureDecomposition.suspectedTechnicalCause: Envelope width near threshold changes point state under small perturbations.

failureDecomposition.currentDecisionRule: High/medium confidence is assigned by hard distance and margin boundaries.
failureDecomposition.suspectedTechnicalCause: Hard confidence boundaries turn minor perturbations into state changes.

failureDecomposition.currentDecisionRule: Point occupancy does not explicitly separate high-speed transit or discontinuity from occupancy.
failureDecomposition.suspectedTechnicalCause: Fast movement samples can be admitted as lane presence if geometry is near a lane axis.

failureDecomposition.currentDecisionRule: Episode stability primarily depends on consecutive lane state and duration.
failureDecomposition.suspectedTechnicalCause: Spatial continuity within the episode is not strict enough.

failureDecomposition.currentDecisionRule: Point and episode outputs are derived separately after segmentation.
failureDecomposition.suspectedTechnicalCause: Segmentation can place nearby point evidence into a different lane context.

failureDecomposition.currentDecisionRule: Brief contacts are retained when interval duration is below minStableSeconds.
failureDecomposition.suspectedTechnicalCause: Interruption handling does not merge stable same-lane fragments.

failureDecomposition.currentDecisionRule: Nearest lane wins when margin clears a low threshold.
failureDecomposition.suspectedTechnicalCause: Boundary-adjacent samples should abstain instead of assigning lane occupancy.

failureDecomposition.currentDecisionRule: Selected model emits occupancy states even when independent support is weak.
failureDecomposition.suspectedTechnicalCause: Internal consistency is being used where abstention is safer.
